title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Komurasaki, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Yasuie as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: so pretty 

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Excuse me, but do you think you could show me your panti-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: KyaAA AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A ghost!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aaah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's why there were so many offerings at the well.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kinemon told me to just keep saying

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'm hungry, so I'm going to curse you" and so I did.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But seriously, I can't believe you're momono- suke's younger sister!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: You're as pretty as that courtesan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you've got way too much hair for a skeleton!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO, I'm SO JEALOUS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: of what? I was just sleeping.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry! I was just so cold, so I...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But sleeping next to me makes most men quite happy! Did it make you happy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: got right to the point there, didn't we.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yoho hoho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, after going to meet Nami, who went to the baths

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yesterday, I wasn't able to find her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And now the Capital's in chaos!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The streets are filled with people who've turned out for the funeral of Wano's most beautiful woman, the courtesan Komurasaki,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And! The robber that gives what he steals to the poor,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Midnight Boy has been caught!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Mid- Night Boy?! Impossible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His identity was unknown for so long, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It turns out he was the talk of ebisu town! Something-yasu, I believe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's more, that man actually happens to be-

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Huh?! Tono- Yasuie?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes! That's the name!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHATA-?! that's my dad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WhAAA AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is very bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I find this hard to say, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That man is going to be executed in the capital today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What aaa?!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Wait! TOKO! NO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Daddy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Daddy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're after your life too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going after her! Thank you for everything yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold up, dummy. I'm coming too! You obviously can't protect her by yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait! I just got back from the Capital!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute- Eeee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KOMU- RASAKI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Courte- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAAAG GGHHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Come before us again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: o treasure of wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to see this kind of courtesan's procession!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 50 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
